sql_array: CREATE TABLE employee_job_history (EMPLOYEE_ID integer, START_DATE date, JOB_TITLE varchar(255));
INSERT INTO employee_job_history (EMPLOYEE_ID, START_DATE, JOB_TITLE) VALUES (1, '2023-01-01', 'Developer'), (2, NULL, 'Designer'), (3, '2022-12-31', NULL);
SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, sprintf_iri_or_null('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d_%s', EMPLOYEE_ID, JOB_TITLE) AS IRI FROM employee_job_history WHERE JOB_TITLE IS NOT NULL;

SELECT AVG(EMPLOYEE_ID), COUNT(*) AS COUNT_STAR, bif:sha1(sprintf_iri_or_null('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d', EMPLOYEE_ID)) AS HASH FROM employee_job_history GROUP BY JOB_TITLE HAVING COUNT_STAR > 1;
CREATE TABLE department (DEPT_ID integer PRIMARY KEY, DEPT_NAME varchar(100));

SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, d.DEPT_NAME, sprintf_iri_or_null('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d_%s', e.EMPLOYEE_ID, d.DEPT_NAME) AS IRI FROM employee_job_history e JOIN department d ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL AND (d.DEPT_ID = (SELECT MIN(DEPT_ID) FROM department));

SELECT bif:sha1(sprintf_iri_or_null('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d_%s', EMPLOYEE_ID, cast(START_DATE as varchar))) AS HASH FROM employee_job_history GROUP BY START_DATE HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, bif:sha1(sprintf_iri_or_null('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d_%s', EMPLOYEE_ID, NULL)) AS NULL_HASH FROM employee_job_history;
ALTER TABLE employee_job_history ADD COLUMN SALARY decimal(10, 2);
UPDATE employee_job_history SET SALARY = 60000 WHERE EMPLOYEE_ID = 1;
